summary: FQ-09A asset roadmap and prompt packs: docs/ASSET_ROADMAP.md (validator-required with a live/planned/prompt-pack/no-baked-text phrase lock) maps every renderable id for future human/LLM art passes - pipeline facts (convention paths, fallback-always, FQ-09V variant pools, no import step), live tables for 11 blocks, 16 item icons, 3 live enemies, 9 equipment icons, 2 back walls, 3 backdrop layers, and the 8 opening cel-frame scenes (path/size/transparency/fallback/priority/prompt-note per id), the drawn-shape actors needing renderer extensions (player, town hall, pulse), honest planned tables keyed to their gating queue items (FQ-10 ores, FQ-11 stations/ingots, FQ-12 farming, FQ-13+ enemies, FQ-09M effects, cave walls/backgrounds, phase C-E ancestry sprites, FQ-14/15 UI), and per-category prompt packs under one shared preamble derived from the canon bible. Decision: no data/asset_manifest.json - nothing consumes one; the roadmap is the manifest. Docs-only: suite unchanged at 210/210. Haiku verifier fact-checked the inventory id-by-id: NO FINDINGS.
scope: FQ-09A only, per docs/FABLE_TASK_QUEUE.md - no art produced, no code/data/save changes, no FQ-09M work; planned ids explicitly gated on their systems.
next_action: FQ-09M: lightweight action animation pass. Art production can run in parallel using the roadmap's prompt packs.
